title: Frozen Delight
description: Adds Frozen Up and Farmer's Delight compatibility. Vanilla style.
body:
![A Frozen Up Mod Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TE7Nsrok/images/32c62d7e1f6204dcf7130b35b1321bb7c71d4c7d.png)
Available on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/frozen-delight) & [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/frozen-delight)

📖 About

Frozen Delight is an add-on for [Farmer's Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight) that adds compatibility with [Frozen Up](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/frozen-up).
Lightweight and compatible with most other food mods via common tags by default.

📦 Features
- A new type of knife with useful effect
- Many new uses for Truffles (even the Frozen ones!)
- New cooked meals with useful effects for survival and comfort
- Quality of life recipes for builders, cooks and mod compatibility enthusiasts
- And much more! - detailed description [here](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/frozen-delight)


💬 Permissions

✔️ You are allowed to include this mod in [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/frozen-delight) & [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/frozen-delight) modpacks. Also feel free to use this mod in your videos (I would appreciate it if you leave a link to the mod page in the description).

❌ You are not allowed to reupload this mod to any other websites/launchers/apps, use any contents of this mod (textures, models, recipes, tags, etc) in other projects, sell this mod in any way or include in paid modpacks - this mod is free for all players.
